title: BEHAVIORAL HEALTH - 211info
text: THREE RINVERS BEHAVIORAL HEALTH COOS BAY BEHAVIORAL HEALTH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides individual, couples, and family counseling, mental health evaluations, and medication management for both adult and pediatric patients. Additional support includes care coordination to help patients access services within the clinic and in the wider community. Also provides case management and peer support in partnership with tribal law enforcement to help individuals with behavioral health needs focus on recovery and avoid involvement with the criminal justice system. 250 Hull Street Coos Bay, OR 97420 Eligibility: Tribal members of the Confederated Tribes of the Coos, Lower Umpqua and Siuslaw Indians and their widows/widowers Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-6pm Email (541) 435-7200 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 435-7200 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP, Medicare, and most private insurances. Sliding scale fees available. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information for those applying for sliding scale fees. AREA SERVED: Coos, Curry, Douglas, Lane, and Lincoln Counties Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling * Native American Community Case/Care Management * Mental Health Issues * Native American Community Conjoint Counseling * Native American Community Family Counseling * Native American Community Individual Counseling * Native American Community Mental Health Evaluation * Native American Community Psychiatric Medication Services * Native American Community If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. THREE RINVERS BEHAVIORAL HEALTH COOS BAY
